heading: Prerequisites
body:
To use PingOne as an IdP (Identity Provider) for Atlas, you must have:

- A PingOne subscription. To obtain a subscription, visit the
  [Google Workspace portal](https://workspace.google.com).

- A PingOne user with administrative privileges. To grant a user
  administrative privileges, see
  [Make a user an admin](https://support.google.com/a/answer/172176?hl=en\&ref_topic=2785005).
  Alternatively, you may use the default administrative user created
  upon activation of your PingOne account.
